title: SettlementPolicyDisclosure v1
description: Machine-readable schema for one append-only disclosure or audit event affecting a trusted gateway or escrow policy in the host-ledger settlement rail.

disclosure/id.description: Stable identifier of this settlement policy disclosure event.

recorded-at.description: Timestamp when the disclosure event was committed as an auditable fact.

effective/from.description: Timestamp from which the disclosed impact becomes effective.

effective/until.description: Optional timestamp until which the disclosed impact remains effective.

federation/id.description: Federation scope in which the disclosed settlement policy event applies.

policy/ref.description: Referenced settlement policy affected by this disclosure event.

operator/org-ref.description: Accountable organization operating the affected settlement policy at event time.

serving/node-id.description: Serving node observed under the affected settlement policy at event time.

event/type.description: Open event namespace for settlement-policy disclosures. Example families: `lifecycle/suspended`, `limits/tightened`, `incident/opened`.

disclosure/scope.description: Maximum disclosure scope admitted for this event.

impact/mode.description: Practical operator impact implied by the disclosed event.

reason/summary.description: Short human-readable summary explaining why the disclosure event exists.

changed/fields.description: Optional policy fields or operational dimensions materially affected by this disclosure event.

case/ref.description: Optional review or incident case reference.

exception/ref.description: Optional bounded exception record authorizing or constraining the disclosed event.

basis/refs.description: Optional references to receipts, holds, incident materials, or other audit artifacts that justify the disclosure event.

supersedes/ref.description: Optional earlier disclosure event superseded by this one.
